subject: Reimbursement Request: Travel Expenses 3200 CNY
body: Hello, this is Zhang Wei. My total travel expenses for the Beijing business trip came to 3200 CNY, invoice number INV-001. Please review. Attached are the itemized costs for flights, hotel, and transportation.

subject: Reimbursement Request: Office Supplies 850 CNY
body: Hello Finance Department, I purchased a batch of office supplies (stapler, printing paper, file folders, etc.) totaling 850 CNY, invoice number INV-002. Please approve the reimbursement.

subject: Reimbursement Request: External Training Fee 5000 CNY
body: Hello, I attended the 'Cloud-Native Architecture' external training course on March 20th, costing 5000 CNY, invoice number INV-003. Department manager approval has been obtained. Please process.

subject: Reimbursement Request: Client Entertainment Meal 420 CNY
body: Hello, the meal expenses for entertaining clients on March 22nd totaled 420 CNY, invoice number INV-004. Attendees: Chen Jing and 2 people from the client side. Please process the reimbursement.

subject: Administrative Notice: Team Building Event Next Wednesday Afternoon
body: Attention all colleagues, a team building event will be held next Wednesday at 2 PM downstairs from the office building. Please attend on time. See attachment for details.
